info.name: Packrat API
info.description:
REST API for Packrat inventory (`packrat_api`). Set `base_url` if you use another host/port (`LISTEN_ADDR`).

Successful JSON responses use `{ "data": ... }`. Error JSON uses `{ "error": { "message": "..." } }`. DELETE success is 204 with no body.

- **GET /api/health** — liveness (no DB).
- **GET /api/ready** — readiness (`SELECT 1` on Postgres).
- **GET /api/assets** — list active (non-deleted) assets.
- **POST /api/assets/search** — search by `name` (exact) and/or `fuzzyname` (case-insensitive substring).
- **GET /api/assets/:id/children** — active rows whose `parent_id` is that id.

request.description: Liveness probe. 200 JSON: `{ "data": { "status": "ok" } }`. Does not hit the database.
Readiness probe: runs `SELECT 1` on Postgres. 200 with `{ "data": { "status": "ready", "database": "ok" } }` when DB is up; 503 with standard error JSON if the database is unreachable.
Returns `{ "data": [ AssetDto, ... ] }` for all assets where `deleted` is null, ordered by name (case-insensitive).

Body JSON: optional `name` (exact match on stored name, case-sensitive) and optional `fuzzyname` (case-insensitive substring). At least one must be non-empty. Both may be set; filters are combined with AND. Returns `{ "data": [ AssetDto, ... ] }` for active assets only.
Creates a root asset when `parent_id` is null. Set `parent_id` to an existing asset id to nest.
Returns 404 if the asset does not exist. Change the `1` in the path to another id as needed.
Returns `{ "data": [ AssetDto, ... ] }` for active assets with `parent_id` equal to the path id (ordered by name). Empty array if none. Change `1` in the path as needed.
204 on success. 404 if not found. 409 if the asset still has children. Change the `1` in the path to another id as needed.
